properties.name: Regierungsviertel MVP bounds
properties.description: Landmark-fitted polygon covering Brandenburger Tor, Reichstag, Bundeskanzleramt, Paul-Löbe-Haus, Marie-Elisabeth-Lüders-Haus, Berlin Hauptbahnhof, Haus der Kulturen der Welt ('Schwangere Auster'), eastern Tiergarten strip down to the Tiergartentunnel south entrance at Sony Center / Potsdamer Platz. Derived from the convex hull of the eight landmarks plus a ~180 m margin; refine in the bounds editor.
properties.source: Convex hull of landmarks.geojson + 180 m buffer (isometric_berlin.generation.create_bounds)
